ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being configured */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value for the sensor range */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value for the sensor range */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the sensor readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being read */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operational unit where the reading was taken */,
  "sensor_reading_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor reading */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES operational_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operational_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the operational unit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the operational unit */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operational unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor reading being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the reading */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the reading was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor reading that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
